set.body: Phase 5 fresh-eyes walkthrough: README says to start with vignette("gpu"), but after local source install, vignette("amatrix"), vignette("gpu"), and vignette("performance") were not discoverable. Either ship discoverable installed vignettes or change README start-here links to pkgdown articles that are actually available.
set.title: Make installed vignettes discoverable or update start-here links
